footer.copyright: © {{year}} Congruent Solutions Inc. All rights reserved.

legal.privacy_p1: Congruent Solutions, Inc. ("we", "us", or "our") respects your privacy. This Privacy Policy describes how we collect, use, disclose, and safeguard your information when you use this participant portal and related retirement plan services.
legal.privacy_p2: We collect information you provide directly (such as account registration details), information related to your employer-sponsored plan as permitted by law, and technical data such as device and usage information to operate and secure the service. We use this information to administer your plan, comply with legal obligations, communicate with you, and improve our services.
legal.privacy_p3: We do not sell your personal information. We may share information with service providers who assist in plan administration, as required by law, or with your consent. You may have rights regarding access, correction, or deletion of certain information depending on your jurisdiction. For questions about this policy, contact your plan administrator or our support team.
legal.terms_p1: By accessing or using this participant portal, you agree to these Terms of Service. If you do not agree, do not use the service.
legal.terms_p2: The portal is provided to help you view and manage your retirement plan information. Features may change over time. You are responsible for safeguarding your login credentials and for the accuracy of information you submit.
legal.terms_p3: To the fullest extent permitted by applicable law, the service is provided "as is" without warranties of any kind. Nothing in these terms alters any rights or obligations set forth in your plan documents, summary plan description, or agreements between you, your employer, and the plan.
legal.help_p1: Find answers about enrolment, contributions, investments, loans, withdrawals, and using this portal. If you cannot find what you need, our support team is here to help.
legal.help_p2: For account-specific questions (including personal balance, transactions, or employer plan rules), contact your plan administrator or HR department. For technical issues signing in or using this website, email our support team using the address below.

cta.left_off: You left off at step {{current}} of {{total}}

plan.single_title: Your employer offers a {{plan}} retirement plan
plan.single_desc_traditional: This plan allows tax-deferred retirement savings. Your contributions reduce your taxable income today.
plan.single_desc_roth: This plan allows you to contribute after-tax dollars and withdraw tax-free in retirement.
plan.choose_subtitle: Select the retirement plan that fits your tax strategy.
plan.most_common_tip: Chosen by most employees because it reduces taxable income today.
plan.traditional_desc: Lower taxes today and grow savings tax-deferred.
plan.roth_desc: Pay taxes now and withdraw tax-free in retirement.
plan.not_sure: Not sure which plan is right for you?
plan.ai_help: Our AI assistant can help explain the differences.
plan.ai_body: Traditional 401(k) is ideal if you expect to be in a lower tax bracket in retirement — your contributions reduce your taxable income now. Roth 401(k) is better if you expect higher income later — you pay taxes now but withdraw tax-free. Most employees benefit from the Traditional plan due to the immediate tax savings and employer match.

contribution_page.title: Set your retirement savings
contribution_page.subtitle: We'll guide you to the right contribution for your future
contribution_page.pro_tip_body: Increasing just 1% could add ~{{amount}} to your retirement
contribution_page.projection_sub: Growth over 30 years at 7% annual return
contribution_page.disclaimer: Projection assumes 7% annual return. Actual results may vary. Monthly income uses 4% withdrawal rule.

source_page.title: How do you want to pay taxes?
source_page.subtitle: Choose when you want to pay taxes on your savings.
source_page.plan_default_sub: Applied if no changes are made
source_page.default_footer: Your employer's default allocation balances tax benefits.
source_page.reco_mix: {{pre}}% Pre-Tax / {{roth}}% Roth — optimized for your profile
source_page.reco_hint: Roth may be better — tax-free income later
source_page.card_roth_p2: Pay taxes now at current rate

auto_increase_page.title: Increase your savings automatically
auto_increase_page.subtitle: Small increases today can grow your retirement savings over time.
auto_increase_page.enable_body: Increase by 1% each year up to 15%.
auto_increase_page.impact_banner: Automatic increases could add {{amount}} over 10 years.

auto_increase_skip.title: No Auto Increase Configured
auto_increase_skip.body: Your {{plan}} contribution rate will stay at {{rate}}%. You can always enable auto increase later from your plan settings.
auto_increase_skip.alert_body: By skipping, you will be losing {{amount}} in potential retirement savings over 10 years.

auto_increase_setup.title: Configure your automatic increases
auto_increase_setup.subtitle: Your contribution will gradually increase over time.
auto_increase_setup.increase_label: How much do you want to increase per cycle?
auto_increase_setup.stop_hint: Your contribution rate will not exceed this percentage.
auto_increase_setup.footnote: Automatic increases apply once per year on your enrolment anniversary. You can change or disable automatic increases at any time.
auto_increase_setup.summary_at_max: Your contribution rate is already at or above your selected maximum.
auto_increase_setup.summary_pick: Select an increase amount to see your contribution growth path.
auto_increase_setup.summary_grow: Your contribution will grow from {{fromPct}}% to {{toPct}}% over approximately {{years}} {{yearsUnit}}.
auto_increase_setup.could_add: Could add approximately {{amount}} more to your retirement savings.

success_page.activated: Your retirement plan has been successfully activated.

review_page.title: Review Your Retirement Plan
review_page.subtitle: Confirm your selections before you enrol.
review_page.projected_note: Based on your current plan setup over {{years}} years. Past results do not guarantee future returns.
review_page.confidence_high: Your employer contributes ${{amount}} per year to your retirement savings.
review_page.confidence_default: You are on track for retirement at age {{age}} with your current plan setup.
review_page.terms: I confirm my retirement plan enrolment and understand my contributions will begin next pay period.
review_page.persist_no_user: Sign in to save your enrollment to your account. Your progress is stored on this device until you sign in.
review_page.persist_failed: We could not save your enrollment to the server. Check your connection and try again, or contact support if this continues.

manage_page.title: Enrolment Management
manage_page.subtitle: View and manage your retirement plan enrolments across all available assets.

trad-401k.name: Traditional 401(k)
trad-401k.description: Maximize your savings with pre-tax contributions. This plan allows you to defer taxes on your contributions and earnings until withdrawal.

roth-ira.name: Roth IRA
roth-ira.description: Tax-free growth and tax-free withdrawals in retirement. Perfect for those who expect to be in a higher tax bracket later in life.

403b.name: 403(b) Plan
403b.ineligible: Not available for your current employment classification. Please contact HR for more information regarding eligibility requirements.

readiness.title: Your Retirement Readiness
readiness.subtitle: Here's how your choices add up before you finalize.
readiness.score_message_low: Every step counts toward your goal.
readiness.on_track_line: You are {{onTrack}} for your retirement goal.
readiness.peer_benchmark: Most participants your age aim for a readiness score of 65 or higher.
readiness.understanding_body: Your score of {{score}} is based on contributions, timeline, and projected growth—there's room to improve.
readiness.annual_footnote: This shows the gap between your retirement income goal and current annual contributions. Close this gap by increasing contributions or adjusting your retirement timeline.
readiness.reco_body: You can reach a score of {{potentialScore}} — apply the recommendations below to boost your readiness by +{{points}} points.
readiness.optional_title: Optional ways to improve your readiness
readiness.optional_sub: You can apply one of these improvements to increase your retirement readiness score.
readiness.all_applied_sub: Your score and balance have been optimized.
readiness.suggest_boost_desc: A small increase now compounds into significant retirement savings over time.
readiness.suggest_auto_desc: Automatically increase your contribution by {{amt}}% each year up to {{max}}%.
readiness.suggest_upgrade_title: Adjust investment strategy for higher growth
readiness.suggest_upgrade_desc: Switch from {{from}} to {{to}} for potentially higher long-term returns.

investment.title: Your Investment Strategy
investment.subtitle: See how each contribution source is invested.
investment.why_body: Balanced for growth with your retirement timeline
investment.customize_sub: Adjust your investment allocation based on your preferences and risk tolerance.
investment.customize_for: Best for experienced investors who want more control over their portfolio.
investment.advisor_sub: Get help from a certified financial advisor to choose the right investment strategy for your goals.
investment.build_modal_sub_select: Select a source to customize its investment allocation
investment.modal_edit_sub: Set fund allocations for all contribution sources.
investment.profile_desc_conservative: A focus on capital preservation with steady, predictable returns suited for risk-averse retirement planning.
investment.profile_desc_balanced: A mix of growth and stability designed for long-term retirement investing.
investment.profile_desc_growth: Emphasizes long-term capital appreciation while accepting higher short-term volatility.
investment.profile_desc_aggressive: Maximizes growth potential through equity-heavy allocations, suited for longer time horizons.

transactions.qa_rebalance_hint: Keeps your portfolio aligned with risk
transactions.qa_rollover_hint: Combine old plans with no tax penalty

employer_match.description: Contributing 4%. Increase to 6% to unlock $2,400 yearly in employer matches.

retirement_outlook.title: Retirement Outlook

center_page.what_like_to_do: What would you like to do?
center_page.outlook_footer: Illustrative projection — not a guarantee of future results.

loan.loanType: What type of loan do you need?
loan.eligibility_subtitle: Review your loan eligibility details before proceeding with a loan request.
loan.eligibility_restriction_1: You can have a maximum of 2 active loans at any time
loan.eligibility_restriction_2: Loan repayment will be automatically deducted from your paycheck
loan.eligibility_restriction_3: Early repayment is allowed without penalties
loan.eligibility_restriction_4: Maximum loan amount is the lesser of 50% of vested balance or $50,000
loan.eligibility_restriction_5: Spousal consent may be required depending on plan rules
loan.eligibility_docs_body: You will need to provide a voided check or bank statement for EFT disbursement, sign a promissory note, and may need spousal consent or employment verification depending on your plan and loan type.
